series_metadata.series_title: High Tier Winning Ticket Security Validations
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation of the confidential process conducted by Lottery Security to validate each High Tier winning online game ticket ($50,000+).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy for four (4) years in a secure area with access limited to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, then destroy., Paper: Shred
